name: Creamy Chicken Bake
recipeIngredient: 4 Boneless Chicken Breasts, split and flattened
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts in a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
2. Top with cheese.
3. Combine Cream of Broccoli Soup and milk and spread over cheese.
4. Toss melted butter with stuffing mix and sprinkle over top of chicken.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 minutes, or until tender.
Makes 4-6 servings
